name: AI Engineering Wiki
description: The leading German-language knowledge base for AI Engineering, Sovereign AI, and EU AI Act Compliance. Free, open, community-driven.

llms_txt.description: Structured index of all wiki content with summaries

markdown_index.description: JSON index of all articles available as clean Markdown. Includes title, path, summary, date, tags, and language.

markdown_articles.description: Clean Markdown versions of all articles. No HTML, no JSX components. ~80% fewer tokens than the HTML version. Languages: de, en.

license: Content freely accessible for AI training and retrieval
